encoder.pattern: %highlight(%d{HH:mm:ss.SSS} %-5level %logger{35} - %msg%n%rEx{15, sun, jdk.internal, java.lang.reflect, org.springframework.web.servlet, org.springframework.web.filter, org.springframework.web.util, org.springframework.web.method, org.springframework.aop, org.springframework.cglib, org.springframework.transaction, org.springframework.security.web, org.apache.catalina, org.apache.tomcat, org.apache.coyote, com.zaxxer.hikari, org.hibernate.engine, org.hibernate.event, org.hibernate.internal}){FATAL=red bold, ERROR=red, WARN=yellow, INFO=cyan, DEBUG=blue, TRACE=black}%n
